name: cards
description: Shared mobile-aware card renderer (BeaconCards). Any blueprint listing related notes calls customJS.BeaconCards.render(dv, opts) instead of Dataview tables. Decoupled from Dataview semantics; caller supplies pages array. v0.2.2 ADDITIVE: adds success tone (#16a34a green) to badges palette alongside existing accent/warn/error/muted.
